_meta.purpose: Historical incident catalog cho LLM retrieval / RAG layer. 30 incident giả lập 6 tháng GeekShop production.
_meta.schema: {id, ts, severity, services_involved, root_cause_service, root_cause_class, summary, remediation, mttd_min, mttr_min}
_meta.note: Trainer-only sees ground truth that scenario chính match closest với INC-2025-11-08 (payment connection pool exhaustion). Students should observe LLM retrieval pick this incident.

incidents.summary: Catalog page load > 5s. Missing index on products.category_id after schema migration.
incidents.remediation: Add covering index on (category_id, status). Backfill stats.

incidents.summary: Payment timeout cascading to checkout. Long-running ETL holding row lock on payments table.
incidents.remediation: Kill ETL session. Move ETL to read replica. Add lock_timeout = 5s in app.

incidents.summary: Cart loss spikes. cart-redis maxmemory hit, allkeys-lru evicting active carts.
incidents.remediation: Tăng maxmemory 4GB → 8GB. Switch policy → volatile-lru. Set TTL trên transient keys.

incidents.summary: Recommender OOM mỗi 4h sau deploy v3.1. Pandas DataFrame không release giữa request.
incidents.remediation: Patch leak; rollback v3.0 trong khi chờ. Add gc.collect() trong handler.

incidents.summary: TLS cert expired sáng. Cert renewal automation fail im lặng 2 tuần trước.
incidents.remediation: Renew bằng tay. Fix renewal job. Add alert 14 ngày trước expire.

incidents.summary: Payment timeout 100%. Deploy v2.6 leak DB connection — pool from 50 → 50 hold, never return.
incidents.remediation: Rollback v2.6. Add max_idle_time + leak detection. Increase pool 50 → 100 cushion.

incidents.summary: Search latency p99 1.5s → 8s. New seller import → 2M rows, no ANALYZE chạy, planner pick wrong index.
incidents.remediation: ANALYZE catalog tables. Schedule weekly ANALYZE.

incidents.summary: Notification lag 5 phút. Consumer group rebalance liên tục sau khi auto-scale add 4 instance.
incidents.remediation: Static partition assignment cho group. Cap auto-scale 1 instance / 30s.

incidents.summary: Checkout slow vì inventory-svc retry vô hạn khi stock-fetch timeout.
incidents.remediation: Add circuit breaker (Hystrix-style) 50% error → open. Cap retry = 3.

incidents.summary: Recommendation CTR drop 30%. New product taxonomy không có embedding tương ứng.
incidents.remediation: Re-train embedding. Add monitoring trên unknown_category_rate.

incidents.summary: Payment-svc v3.2 deploy at 09:42 leak DB pool. Pool 50/50 used trong 5 phút. Downstream checkout cascade. Notification queue backed up.
incidents.remediation: Rollback to v3.1. Scale pool 50 → 100 cushion. Add pool monitor alert > 80%.

incidents.summary: Auth deny legitimate user sau khi tighten rate limit 100→10 req/min by mistake.
incidents.remediation: Revert config. Add canary cho rate limit changes.

incidents.summary: Postgres autovacuum trên large table block read query. Catalog + search degrade.
incidents.remediation: Tune autovacuum: workers + maintenance_work_mem. Schedule manual VACUUM.

incidents.summary: Bad nginx config push (typo upstream block) → 502 sau khi reload.
incidents.remediation: Rollback config. Lint config in CI. Canary reload.

incidents.summary: Payment 100% error. New blocking call (sync HTTP to bank) drain thread pool.
incidents.remediation: Switch to async client. Bulkhead thread pool size limit.

incidents.summary: Inventory cache expired cùng lúc → 4000 req/s hit DB cùng lúc → spike.
incidents.remediation: Probabilistic early expiration. Add jitter to TTL.

incidents.summary: Search trả 3s sau khi enable 'related products' feature. N+1 query trên catalog-db.
incidents.remediation: Batch fetch related products. Add monitoring query count / request.

incidents.summary: Email provider (SendGrid) regional outage. Notification queue grow nhưng không impact checkout (async).
incidents.remediation: Failover to backup provider. Multi-provider routing.

incidents.summary: Cart-redis primary failover, replica chưa sync. Lost ~30s writes.
incidents.remediation: Reduce min_replicas_to_write. Enable AOF persistence.

incidents.summary: Recommender daily retrain overlap với marketing read job, contention trên catalog-db.
incidents.remediation: Stagger schedule. Move retrain to read replica.

incidents.summary: Volumetric DDoS 5x normal traffic. Edge-lb saturate, all upstream visible degraded.
incidents.remediation: WAF rate-limit + Cloudflare proxy. Geographic rule.

incidents.summary: Checkout deadlock acquiring cart-redis + payments-db cùng lúc giữa 2 transaction.
incidents.remediation: Order lock acquisition. Add lock timeout.

incidents.summary: Catalog v4.0 trả wrong field name. Recommender break vì depend.
incidents.remediation: Rollback v4.0. Add contract test giữa catalog + recommender.

incidents.summary: Auth login slow vì 1 query đếm transaction từ user joining payments-db không có index.
incidents.remediation: Add index. Decouple auth from payments-db.

incidents.summary: Lặp lại pattern INC-2025-11-08. Pool monitor không trigger vì threshold đặt 95% (pool 50 thì 47 connection hold pre-spike). After-action: lower threshold to 80%.
incidents.remediation: Lower pool monitor threshold 95% → 80%. Auto-rollback nếu pool full > 60s.

incidents.summary: Notification spam (5x normal) sau khi enable feature flag mới mà không gate.
incidents.remediation: Disable flag. Add rate-limit per user.

incidents.summary: Search latency spike sau restart vì cache cold. ~10 phút phục hồi.
incidents.remediation: Pre-warm cache trên health check. Tăng warmup quota.

incidents.summary: Inventory read stale data 30s. Replication lag spike do bulk import on primary.
incidents.remediation: Throttle bulk import. Read from primary for stock-critical query.

incidents.summary: Recommendation stale 1 ngày. Upstream Spark job fail im lặng.
incidents.remediation: Add alert trên feature freshness. SLA cho upstream job.
